94.reason: [The loop condition is incorrect: 'zhishu' is an integer read from input and will never equal '\n' (which is 10). This causes infinite loop or undefined behavior. The program should check for end-of-line differently, e.g., by using character inspection after scanf or checking return value of scanf.]
